title: post apiauthlogin with valid and invalid credentials
description: Test the /api/auth/login endpoint by submitting valid user credentials to receive a successful authentication response with a JWT token, and invalid credentials to verify the response returns a 401 Unauthorized status with an 'Invalid credentials' error message.

title: post apiauthregister with valid and invalid payloads
description: Test the /api/auth/register endpoint by submitting a valid registration payload including name, email, and password to receive a 201 Created response with a JWT token, and invalid or incomplete payloads to verify proper validation errors are returned.

title: get apiauthme with valid and missing authorization
description: Test the /api/auth/me endpoint by calling it with a valid Authorization header containing a JWT token to retrieve the current user profile, and without the Authorization header to verify it returns a 401 Unauthorized error.

title: get apidashboard with and without authorization
description: Test the /api/dashboard endpoint by calling it with a valid Authorization header to receive aggregated metrics including revenue, router status, and active users, and without authorization to verify it returns a 401 Unauthorized error.

title: get and post apiclients with valid and invalid data
description: Test the /api/clients endpoint by retrieving a list of clients with a valid Authorization header, creating a new client with a complete payload to receive a 201 Created response, and submitting incomplete or invalid client data to verify validation errors are returned.

title: get post apirouters with valid and invalid router data
description: Test the /api/routers endpoint by listing routers with a valid Authorization header, creating a new router with valid data to receive a 201 Created response including setup instructions, and submitting invalid router names to verify validation errors are returned.

title: post apihotspotpurchase with valid and invalid payment details
description: Test the /api/hotspot/purchase endpoint by submitting a valid purchase payload to receive voucher or activation details, and submitting insufficient or invalid payment information to verify the response returns a 402 Payment Required or 400 error with appropriate messages.

title: get apipackages list and filtering
description: Test the /api/packages endpoint to ensure it returns a list of billing packages and supports filtering by type or status.

title: post apipackages create new package
description: Test creating a new billing package with valid parameters (name, price, duration) and verify it returns 201 Created.

title: get apitransactions history
description: Test the /api/transactions endpoint to retrieve the list of financial transactions and verify the data structure.

title: get apisubscriptions active and expired
description: Test the /api/subscriptions endpoint to ensure it returns client subscriptions with correct status and dates.

title: client detail operations get put delete
description: Test the /api/clients/[id] endpoint for retrieving, updating, and deleting a specific client record.

title: post apivouchersgenerate with valid parameters
description: Test the /api/vouchers/generate endpoint by providing a package ID and count to generate new voucher codes, and verify the response contains the generated vouchers.

title: get and post apiexpenses for financial tracking
description: Test the /api/expenses endpoint by listing all expenses and creating a new expense entry with valid category, amount, and description.

title: get apireports for system analytics
description: Test the /api/reports endpoint to ensure it returns aggregated data for revenue, client growth, and other key performance indicators.

title: post apismsbulk to send messages to clients
description: Test the /api/sms/bulk endpoint by sending a test message to a list of client IDs and verifying the success response.

title: get and post apiequipment for inventory management
description: Test the /api/equipment endpoint by listing equipment and adding a new item with serial number and model details.

title: post apiauthforgotpasswordrequestotp with valid identifier
description: Test the /api/auth/forgot-password/request-otp endpoint by providing a valid email or phone number to receive a success message for OTP dispatch.

title: get and put apisettings for system configuration
description: Test the /api/settings endpoint to retrieve current system configurations and update a setting (e.g., company name) to verify changes are saved.

title: get apipaymentchannels list
description: Test the /api/payment-channels endpoint to list available payment gateways like M-Pesa, PalmPesa, etc.
